meaning: n.装备,设备,器材,装置,铁道车辆,(一企业除房地产以外的)固定资产,才能
examples: We lease all our computer equipment.
The equipment can be tricky to install.
Part of the investment will be used to install high-volume composite carbon fibre manufacturing equipment.
Local officials said residents used scopes and other equipment to see details on the warplanes.
